generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that 72% of our allies in NATO still rely on foreign tech for critical infrastructure? While some push for complete autonomy, the smart move is balanced modernization. We can't afford to cut ties with proven partners while building our own capabilities. Let's focus on practical security, not ideological purity. #SmartDefense #NATO
